**Fix 2 Analysis:** Card family migration. The incidents are:
- Line 13: `Card` import - type changed from `FunctionComponent<CardProps>` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent<Omit<CardProps, "ref"> & RefAttributes>`. This is a type-level change; the import itself doesn't need modification.
- Line 45: `<Card>` usage - same type change. The JSX usage doesn't need modification since no removed props are being used.

The only change is the **addition** of `'stateful'`. The value `link` is still valid in the new type. **No code change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Lines 13, 45, Card family migration): 
- Line 13: `Card` import. The type changed from `FunctionComponent<CardProps>` to `ForwardRefExoticComponent<Omit<CardProps, "ref"> & RefAttributes>`. This is an internal type change — the import statement itself doesn't change.
- Line 45: `<Card>` usage with no props. No removed props (`hasSelectableInput`, `isDisabledRaised`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`, `isSelectableRaised`, `onSelectableInputChange`, `selectableInputAriaLabel`) are being used. The Card composition (`Card > CardTitle, CardBody, CardFooter`) is already valid v6 structure. **No code change needed.**

The file is already compatible with both fixes. No modifications are required.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (`Button.variant` type change at line 54): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.link` remains valid in the new type union which only added `'stateful'`.

2. **Fix 2** (Card family migration at lines 13, 45): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The `Card` import is unchanged (internal type signature change only), no removed props are used on `<Card>`, and the existing composition (`Card > CardTitle, CardBody, CardFooter`) is valid v6 structure.


### Fix 2
Line: 51
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: CardTitle

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   50  
   51            <Button
   52              isInline

```

### Fix 3
Line: 76
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

### Fix 2
Line: 51
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
